createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_RULE: whole proposed Rule rows staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed or new Rule

column.name: id
column.remarks: Primary key; equals the master Rule id for an edited Rule, or a generated id for a Working-Copy-only Rule

column.name: recommendation_id
column.remarks: Proposed recommendation reference; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: trigger_ingredient_id
column.remarks: Proposed trigger ingredient reference; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: role_or_technique_id
column.remarks: Proposed role or technique reference; optional, resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: cuisine
column.remarks: Proposed cuisine context, English

column.name: rationale
column.remarks: Proposed rationale, English

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this row

column.name: active
column.remarks: Whether this Rule is applied by recipe assessment; a deactivated Rule is retained but ignored at assessment time

column.name: active
column.remarks: Proposed active state, snapshotted from master and toggled by a staged Deactivate or Activate

changeSet.author: nikospara
changeSet.comment: The Rule business key is the triplet (recommendation, trigger ingredient, role or technique), treating a missing role as a value (NULLS NOT DISTINCT). Enforced on both published master and the Working Copy mirror.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE dw_rule ADD CONSTRAINT uq_dw_rule__business_key UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT (recommendation_id, trigger_ingredient_id, role_or_technique_id)
ALTER TABLE dw_rule_wc ADD CONSTRAINT uq_dw_rule_wc__business_key UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT (recommendation_id, trigger_ingredient_id, role_or_technique_id)

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE dw_rule_wc DROP CONSTRAINT uq_dw_rule_wc__business_key
ALTER TABLE dw_rule DROP CONSTRAINT uq_dw_rule__business_key

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_TRIGGER_INGREDIENT: whole proposed Trigger Ingredient rows staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed or new Trigger Ingredient

column.name: id
column.remarks: Primary key; equals the master id for an edited entry, or a generated id for a Working-Copy-only entry

column.name: name
column.remarks: Proposed name, English

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Proposed explanation for the LLM, English

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this row

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_ROLE_OR_TECHNIQUE: whole proposed Role or Technique rows staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed or new Role or Technique

column.name: id
column.remarks: Primary key; equals the master id for an edited entry, or a generated id for a Working-Copy-only entry

column.name: name
column.remarks: Proposed name, English

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Proposed explanation for the LLM, English

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this row

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_RULE_TRANSLATION: proposed per-language Rule rationale translations staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed translation

column.name: rule_id
column.remarks: The Rule this translation belongs to; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: rationale
column.remarks: Proposed translated rationale

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this translation

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_TRIGGER_INGREDIENT_TRANSLATION: proposed per-language Trigger Ingredient name and explanation translations staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed translation

column.name: trigger_ingredient_id
column.remarks: The Trigger Ingredient this translation belongs to; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: name
column.remarks: Proposed translated name

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Proposed translated explanation for the LLM

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this translation

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_ROLE_OR_TECHNIQUE_TRANSLATION: proposed per-language Role or Technique name and explanation translations staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a changed translation

column.name: role_or_technique_id
column.remarks: The Role or Technique this translation belongs to; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: name
column.remarks: Proposed translated name

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Proposed translated explanation for the LLM

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this translation

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_SUGGESTION_TEMPLATE: whole proposed Suggestion Template rows staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a template with a Staged Change

column.name: id
column.remarks: Primary key; equals the master Suggestion Template id for an edited template, or a generated id for a Working-Copy-only template

column.name: rule_id
column.remarks: The Rule this template belongs to; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: alternative_ingredient_id
column.remarks: The suggested AlternativeIngredient; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: alternative_order
column.remarks: Snapshot of the template's position within its Rule

column.name: restriction
column.remarks: Proposed restriction(s) for the substitution, English

column.name: equivalence
column.remarks: Proposed equivalence for the substitution, English

column.name: technique_notes
column.remarks: Proposed technique notes, English

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this row

createTable.remarks: Working Copy mirror of DW_SUGGESTION_TEMPLATE_TRANSLATION: proposed per-language Suggestion Template translations staged for publish; sparse, a row exists only for a template+language whose translation differs from published master

column.name: suggestion_template_id
column.remarks: The Suggestion Template this translation belongs to; resolved against master union Working Copy, not a foreign key

column.name: restriction
column.remarks: Proposed translated restriction(s) for the substitution

column.name: equivalence
column.remarks: Proposed translated equivalence for the substitution

column.name: technique_notes
column.remarks: Proposed translated technique notes

column.name: version
column.remarks: Working Copy optimistic-concurrency version; incremented on each staged change to this translation

column.name: active
column.remarks: Whether this Suggestion Template is offered by recipe assessment; a deactivated template is retained but skipped at assessment time

column.name: active
column.remarks: Proposed active state, snapshotted from master and toggled by a staged Deactivate or Activate
